title: geum × catlingii
intro: Geum × catlingii, also known as the Catling's Avens, is a hybrid species within the Geum genus of flowering plants, characterized by its vibrant flowers and robust growth. The medicinal properties of Geum × catlingii include its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, wounds, and respiratory problems. Geum × catlingii can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible addition to traditional medicine.
